sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n104531" key="tranopoie/w" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">τρᾱνοποιέω</orth>, <sense id="n104531.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">pronounce clearly,</tr_> <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">τὸ ρ̄</quote_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <title_ TEIform="title">Vit.Dem.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">p.305</biblScope> </bibl> </cit> Westermann.</sense> </entryFree>
